시편 46:1.content: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.

시편 46:2.content: Therefore we won’t be afraid, though the earth changes, though the mountains are shaken into the heart of the seas;

시편 46:3.content: though its waters roar and are troubled, though the mountains tremble with their swelling.

시편 46:4.content: There is a river, the streams of which make the city of God glad, the holy place of the tents of the Most High.

시편 46:5.content: God is within her. She shall not be moved. God will help her at dawn.

시편 46:6.content: The nations raged. The kingdoms were moved. He lifted his voice and the earth melted.

시편 46:7.content: Yahweh of Armies is with us. The God of Jacob is our refuge.

시편 46:8.content: Come, see Yahweh’s works, what desolations he has made in the earth.

시편 46:9.content: He makes wars cease to the end of the earth. He breaks the bow, and shatters the spear. He burns the chariots in the fire.

시편 46:10.content: “Be still, and know that I am God. I will be exalted among the nations. I will be exalted in the earth.”

시편 46:11.content: Yahweh of Armies is with us. The God of Jacob is our refuge.
